title: Mobs Drop Random+Op items
description: Every mob drops crazy OP loot — balanced between fun and chaos!
body:
💀 OP Mob Drops Datapack (Minecraft 1.19.2)

Tired of boring mob drops?
This datapack makes every mob drop insane OP loot — balanced perfectly between fun and chaos 😎


⚙️ Features

🧱 Passive Mobs:
Cows, Sheep, Pigs, Chickens, and more drop valuable resources like Iron, Emeralds, Obsidian, Golden Apples, XP Bottles, and food.
Perfect for early survival boosts!

⚔️ Hostile Mobs:
Zombies, Skeletons, Creepers, Spiders, Witches, etc. can drop random enchanted Diamond Armor & Tools, making every fight rewarding.

🔥 Special & Mini-Bosses:
Piglin Brute, Ravager, Evoker, Guardian, Elder Guardian, Iron Golem — each has a unique themed loot table like Totems, Tridents, Prismarine, or Iron Blocks.

👑 Bosses: Warden,Dragon & wither
Try The mod to know yourself😄 (easter_eggs)

🧩 Gameplay

Normal mobs → 2–3 random drops from 7–8 item pools
Special mobs → fixed OP-themed drops
Boss mobs → guaranteed legendary drops

🪓 Installation

Download the .zip
Place it in your world’s datapacks folder
Run /reload in-game
Defeat mobs and enjoy your new god-tier loot!


💡 Details

🧱 Version: Minecraft 1.19 - 1.19.3

🧩 Type: Datapack (no Forge/Fabric required)

🧰 Works in Singleplayer & Multiplayer

💾 Fully survival-friendly
